description:
Dangerous-feature-only fixture for PromptChunkRegistry (issue #34).

This fixture exercises `Mode::Yolo`, which only exists when the `dangerous` feature flag is enabled. It is replayed ONLY by the dangerous-gated test suite in each language (e.g. Rust `--features dangerous`). The default cross-language suite must NEVER load this file. Same case schema as `basic.json`.
